reviews.review_msg: Dr. Sun's intelligence is inspiring, her lectures are captivating, and she is caring. Her assignments are tough sometimes, but she's always accessible via email, during office hours, or after class. 418 is a tricky course, so be ready to review MATH251&MATH310. She doesn't post lecture notes, but this was an incentive to pay attention in class.

Never choose his course. His homework is disgusting. And his lecture cannot provide enough information to do his homework. He trys to make some bad jokes, but no one cares. The words he use art ambiguous.
